title: 申请加入请在这里评论 （也可以直接发 Pull Request）
summary:
### 入选标准
* 网站 / App
* 如果是 Github 库， README 或顶部描述里，要附上网站或 App Store 地址，不能是纯粹针对开发者的工具，如果包含了针对开发者的工具，那就太多了。所以只允许针对普通用户的网站/App 列在表里

### 不收录的东西
* 开发者工具（Github 本质上就是个开发者工具大集合，收录开发者工具这个表会爆炸的）
* 社区类网站（v2ex，ruby-china，各种 php 社区，太多太多太多了。没法收。希望理解）

### 流程
看了评论后会做决定，
如果入了，会加进去。
如果没入，会告知你理由（希望你不要介意 :

summary:
## 요약

reasoning-capable provider 가 출력 예산을 전부 thinking 에 쓰고 visible text 를 비우는 실패를, `enable_thinking = Some false` 튜닝으로 막고 있습니다. 그런데 이 튜닝이 **구조화 출력 subcall 사이트마다 손으로 복사**되고 있고, 최소 2곳이 누락돼 있습니다.

RFC-0000 §9 의 즉시 reject 시그니처 3번(N-of-M 패치)에 해당합니다. 코드 주석이 신호 문구를 그대로 쓰고 있습니다 — *"Mirror the librarian tun

title: [PR] fix(stop): tear down the dashboard port-forward on stop (#7227)
summary:
<!-- markdownlint-disable MD041 -->
## Summary
`nemoclaw <sandbox> stop` returned success but never tore down the host-side dashboard SSH port-forward it created, leaving an `ssh -L 127.0.0.1:<port>` listener alive. `status` then misreported the cleanly-stopped sandbox as a foreign `sandbox_dashboar

title: [PR] feat(exam): build the full 180-question DO-CAIE exam pool
summary:
## What & why

Builds out the **DigitalOcean Certified AI Engineer (DO-CAIE)** written exam from a 20-question stub into the full **180-question pool**, using only allowed question types. The exam engine draws 60 per attempt, and the pool is precisely 3x that (180), so a learner does not see a repea

title: [PR] Build Atlas local-first assistant runtime with offline-first adapters and Home Assistant control
summary: Atlas now has a runnable local-first assistant skeleton: wake-word driven interaction, offline-capable speech pipeline, bounded conversational context, and Home Assistant control for lights and thermostats. The implementation is intentionally provider-swappable so the default private/local flow work

title: [PR] Add shared BYOK provider support
summary:

title: [PR] Harden secret protection
summary:

- Expand `.gitignore` coverage for environment files, private keys, keystores, cloud/service credentials, package-manager auth, Terraform state, database sidecars, dumps, and backups.
- Keep safe `.env.*.example` and `.npmrc.example` templates committable.
- Add a Gitleaks workflow

title: [PR] CAMEL-24223: Add camel_route_cost_estimate MCP tool
summary:
## Summary

Adds a new MCP tool `camel_route_cost_estimate` that estimates API costs for a Camel route based on its component usage patterns.

- **9 component cost profiles**: Bedrock (per-token), Textract (per-page), S3/SQS/SNS/Kinesis (per-request), OpenAI (per-token), LangChain4j Chat/Embeddings
